x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Scheduling windows define constraints Now Assist FSM uses for AI-optimized dispatch. Without them AI cannot optimize for time and availability.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Configure scheduling windows and constraints in the FSM Dispatcher Workspace. Target: 5+ active scheduling windows covering your field agent availability patterns. Now Assist FSM uses scheduling windows for AI-optimized dispatch.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_cff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cbe
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Scheduling windows define constraints Now Assist FSM uses for AI-optimized dispatch. Without them AI cannot optimize for time and availability.]]></ai_justification><check_name>FSM Scheduling Window Configuration</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function() {
    var t = new GlideRecord("wm_schedule_window");
    if (!t.isValid()) {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: "Required table wm_schedule_window not found", finding: "FSM Scheduling Window table (wm_schedule_window) is not available. Verify the Field Service Management plugin is active." };
    }
    var ga = new GlideAggregate("wm_schedule_window");
    ga.addQuery("active", true);
    ga.addAggregate("COUNT");
    ga.query();
    var count = ga.next() ? parseInt(ga.getAggregate("COUNT")) : 0;
    var actualValue = count + " active scheduling windows";
    if (count >= 5) {
        return { status: "ready", actualValue: actualValue, finding: count + " active scheduling windows. Now Assist FSM can optimize AI dispatch within defined time constraints and availability windows." };
    } else if (count >= 1) {
        return { status: "needs_attention", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "Only " + count + " active scheduling window(s) (target: 5+). Now Assist FSM scheduling optimization will have limited time constraint coverage." };
    } else {
        return { status: "value_blocker", actualValue: actualValue, finding: "No active scheduling windows configured. Now Assist FSM cannot account for agent availability constraints in AI dispatch optimization." };
    }
})()]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>FIELD_SERVICE</module><number>CHK0000440</number><order>130</order><remediation_guidance>Configure scheduling windows and constraints in the FSM Dispatcher Workspace. Target: 5+ active scheduling windows covering your field agent availability patterns. Now Assist FSM uses scheduling windows for AI-optimized dispatch.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:19</sys_created_on><sys_id>cff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cbe</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>FSM Scheduling Window Configuration</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_cff81dc7cfd587108935fb251d851cbe</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
